summary: Completed testing for Iteration 128: Pricing Engine 3 NEW features. All 17 backend API tests passed. All 12 frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: 1) Pipeline Steps Explainability (7 steps: supplier_price, base_markup, channel_rule, agency_rule, promotion, tax, currency_conversion), 2) Rule Precedence Viewer (evaluated_rules array with won/reject_reason/match_score), 3) Margin Guardrails System (CRUD + guardrail_warnings + guardrails_passed validation).
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/simulate returns pipeline_steps array
✅ Pipeline has exactly 7 steps in correct order
✅ Each pipeline step has required fields (step, label, input_price, adjustment_pct, adjustment_amount, output_price, rule_id, rule_name, detail)
✅ Pipeline step prices chain correctly (output -> next input)
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/simulate returns evaluated_rules array
✅ Each evaluated rule has required fields (rule_id, name, category, match_score, priority, value, scope, won, reject_reason)
✅ Winning rules marked with won=True
✅ GET /api/pricing-engine/guardrails returns list of guardrails
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/guardrails creates guardrail (all 4 types tested)
✅ DELETE /api/pricing-engine/guardrails/{guardrail_id} deletes guardrail
✅ GET /api/pricing-engine/metadata returns guardrail_types
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/simulate returns guardrails_passed boolean
✅ POST /api/pricing-engine/simulate returns guardrail_warnings array
✅ Guardrail violation creates warning with correct structure (guardrail, message, severity, expected, actual)
✅ GET /api/pricing-engine/dashboard returns active_guardrails count
✅ Frontend: 5 stat cards visible (Toplam Kural, Aktif Kural, Kanal, Aktif Promosyon, Guardrail)
✅ Frontend: 5 tabs visible (Simulasyon, Kurallar, Kanallar, Promosyonlar, Guardrails)
✅ Frontend: Pipeline Explainer shows 7 colored steps with rule names and amounts
✅ Frontend: Guardrail warning banner appears when min_margin_pct violated
✅ Frontend: Margin metrics show negative margin in red (-€1.68, %-1.71)
✅ Frontend: Evaluated Rules panel expands/collapses with KAZANDI badge for winners
✅ Frontend: Guardrails tab shows guardrail cards with type icons
✅ Frontend: Add Guardrail button opens form with name/type/value/scope fields
✅ Frontend: New guardrail created successfully via UI
critical_code_review_comments: PricingDistributionEngine.calculate() correctly builds pipeline_steps array with 7 sequential steps
_best_match_with_trace() correctly scores rules and marks winner in evaluated_rules
_validate_guardrails() correctly validates 4 guardrail types (min_margin_pct, max_discount_pct, channel_floor_price, supplier_max_markup_pct)
GuardrailWarning dataclass has correct structure for frontend consumption
Frontend PipelineExplainer uses STEP_COLORS for visual differentiation per step type
Frontend EvaluatedRulesPanel correctly shows winners with KAZANDI badge and losers with reject reasons
Frontend GuardrailWarnings shows red banner when guardrails_passed=False with severity icons
Frontend GuardrailsTab correctly handles CRUD operations with form validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 128 tested 3 NEW features on Pricing Engine: 1) pipeline_steps in simulate response - array of 7 steps each with step/label/input_price/adjustment_pct/adjustment_amount/output_price/rule_id/rule_name/detail. 2) evaluated_rules in simulate response - array showing all rules evaluated with match_score/priority/value/scope/won/reject_reason. 3) Guardrails system - GET/POST/DELETE /api/pricing-engine/guardrails with guardrail_id, and simulate returns guardrail_warnings array + guardrails_passed boolean. Frontend has new Guardrails tab (data-testid='tab-guardrails', 'guardrails-tab', 'guardrail-card-*', 'add-guardrail-btn'). Existing min_margin_pct=5 guardrail triggers warning on default simulation. PipelineExplainer (data-testid='pipeline-explainer'), EvaluatedRulesPanel (data-testid='evaluated-rules-panel'), GuardrailWarnings (data-testid='guardrail-warnings') components all working.

frontend_verification.Stat Cards: 5 cards: Toplam Kural=2, Aktif Kural=2, Kanal=4, Aktif Promosyon=2, Guardrail=1
frontend_verification.Tabs: 5 tabs: Simulasyon, Kurallar, Kanallar, Promosyonlar, Guardrails
frontend_verification.Pipeline Explainer: 7 steps with colored borders: Supplier Fiyat(gray) → Baz Markup(blue) → Kanal(violet) → Acente(indigo) → Promosyon(amber) → Vergi(gray) → Kur Donusumu(teal)
frontend_verification.Guardrail Warnings: Red banner with 'Guardrail ihlali tespit edildi' when margin < 5%
frontend_verification.Evaluated Rules Panel: Expandable panel showing 'Kazanan Kurallar' with KAZANDI badge and 'Diger Kurallar' with reject reasons
frontend_verification.Margin Metrics: 4 metrics: Marj (red if negative), Marj %, Gece Basina, Komisyon
frontend_verification.Guardrails Tab: Cards for each guardrail with type icon, value in %/currency, scope JSON, Aktif/Pasif badge

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. All pricing calculations and guardrail validations are real using MongoDB collections.
